productDisplayName: Puma Men Pop Art Red Flip Flops
description: This energetic pair of Pop Art flip-flops from puma are a great choice for casual wear. The straps, along with the designed footbed, add up for maximum impact. The circular grooves on the outsole offer grippy support, making this pair perfect for the pool side or the beach. Team it with jeans and tees from myntra for that casual look.UpperQuick-drying EVA upper for dry comfort for the feetThong construction to hold the forefoot in place, and to add comfort and styleSoft, cushioned footbed for all-day comfortBrand name printed on the footbed for styleOutsoleTPU outsole with round suction points all over for grip and tractionshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
